sglang.title: Clean up imports
sglang.author: merrymercy
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Deprecate python/sglang/srt/server.py
Make the import order cleaner
Clean up all import vllm
Move scaled_fp8_quant from custom_ops.py to fp8_kernel.py
Clean up the usage of from sglang.srt.custom_op import scaled_fp8_quant as sgl_scaled_fp8_quant. Do not use if/else over this.

sglang.title: [verl] Modify the update_weights func to align with verl's resharding
sglang.author: BearBiscuit05
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
For verl's resharding, the interface should be in the form of a generator, as passing a dict is not a good choice. Secondly, the current fsdp-vllm interface, as well as the mcore+sglang interface under development, are both designed as iterators, which can effectively reduce the consumpti

sglang.title: [Model Support] unsloth/Phi-4-mini bnb model
sglang.author: yyihuang
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
Support unsloth phi-4-mini model:

unsloth/Phi-4-mini-instruct-bnb-4bit
unsloth/Phi-4-mini-instruct-unsloth-bnb-4bit

#4042
Modifications

Update llama replacement matching for bnb.
Update quant offset for gate_up_proj layer for unsloth/phi-4-mini bnb model.
Add unsloth model tests.

Chec

vllm.title: [V1][Structured Output] Move xgrammar related utils to `backend_xgrammar.py`
vllm.author: shen-shanshan
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Move xgrammar related utils to backend_xgrammar.py, and only remain the common utils (backend unrelated) in vllm/v1/structured_output/utils.py.
This refactor is a part of #16171.

vllm.title: [CI] Cleanup `additional_dependencies: [toml]` for pre-commit yapf hook
vllm.author: yankay
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
In https://github.com/vllm-project/vllm/blob/main/.pre-commit-config.yaml , there is a TODO note: "Remove when yapf is upgraded."
This PR #12475 , yapf was upgraded from v0.32.0 to v0.43.0. According to yapf's changelog, starting from v0.40.2, toml is now included by default in additional_dependenci

vllm.title: [Doc] Improve OOM troubleshooting
vllm.author: DarkLight1337
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Add a link from troubleshooting guide to a comprehensive list of options that can avoid OOM
Add sections about CUDA Graph and Multi-modal input limits to avoid OOM

FIX #15664
FIX #16551
FIX #16570

vllm.title: [Bugfix][Kernel] fix potential cuda graph broken for merge_attn_states kernel
vllm.author: DefTruth
vllm.bodyExcerpt: Fix potential CUDA graph broken for the merge_attn_states kernel. A CUDA graph error related to merge_state was observed in sglang (sgl-project/sglang#5404) and fixed in sgl-project/sglang#5419. Since the merge_attn_states kernel is often active as a fundamental kernel in many scenarios, it would be

vllm.title: [Model] support modernbert
vllm.author: xsank
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Support modernBert, test passed on Alibaba-NLP/gte-reranker-modernbert-base.
FIX #11347
eg:
curl -X 'POST' \
  'http://127.0.0.1:8000/v1/score' \

  "model": "Alibaba-NLP/gte-reranker-modernbert-base",
  "text_1": ["what is the capital of China?","how t

vllm.title: [Hardware] Add processor inputs to platform validation
vllm.author: joerunde
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
A followup to #16291
This moves the current_platform.validate_request call to after input preprocessing happens, so that the ProcessorInputs can also be passed to the platform. This will ensure the platform plugins have access to the tokenized prompt and multimodal data for validation as well.
This

vllm.title: Improve error for structured output backend selection
vllm.author: hmellor

vllm.title: [Misc] Remove redundant comment
vllm.author: jianzs
vllm.bodyExcerpt: Remove one redundant comment about using torch.index_select instead of np.take.

vllm.title: Help user create custom model for Transformers backend remote code models
vllm.author: hmellor

vllm.title: [V1][Performance] Implement custom serializaton for MultiModalKwargs [Rebased]
vllm.author: p88h
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
FIX #16185 (link existing issues this PR will resolve)
This is a rebase of #16279 which had too entangled commits.
Implements additional handling of MultimodalKwargs on top of #13790
Further improves memory usage on top of improvements in #16273 by another 50%

vllm.title: [V1][Spec Dec Bug Fix] Respect Spec Dec Method Specification
vllm.author: luyuzhe111
vllm.bodyExcerpt: Currently, we try to automatically detect the speculative decoding method. For EAGLE, it detects via the draft model checkpoint folder. However, if the folder name does not have the eagle- substring, the current logic will make the method draft_model even if one has directly specify the method as ea

vllm.title: Adding vllm buildkite job for IBM Power
vllm.author: AaruniAggarwal
vllm.bodyExcerpt: This PR will modify buildkite job to run tests on IBM Power.

vllm.title: [V1][Frontend] Improve Shutdown And Logs
vllm.author: robertgshaw2-redhat
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
SUMMARY:

Prior to this PR, if we encountered an error in a background process, we kill the process tree immediately, which means that we cannot cleanup resources and cannot return good status codes to clients. This PR overhauls the Error handling to instead shut down the background processes and ra

vllm.title: [rocm][V0] fix selection logic for custom PA in V0
vllm.author: divakar-amd
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This PR enables custom Paged Attention for vLLM-V0
When measured on Mistral-7B-v0.1-FP8-KV for input=2048, output=128, bs=128, the e2e latency difference is about 2-3x before and after this PR.
This extends the previous PR: #15982

vllm.title: [Bugfix] Update Florence-2 tokenizer to make grounding tasks work
vllm.author: Isotr0py
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
FIX #16164 (comment)

The Florence-2 hf_processor will add some special tokens to tokenizer for tasks like object detection and OCR with Region. (https://huggingface.co/microsoft/Florence-2-large/blob/main/processing_florence2.py#L87-L94)
This PR updates the tokenizer in Florence-2 examples and test

vllm.title: [Bugfix] Revert max_prompt_len validation for decoder-only models.
vllm.author: davidheineman

vllm.title: [V1] Remove log noise when idle
vllm.author: russellb
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This is a port of the changes from #8868 to V1.
Prior to this change, there was always a log message every 10 seconds,
even when the system is idle. The noise when the metrics are all zeros
doesn't seem very interesting, so this change makes it so the log
message is only emitted while active. It wil

vllm.title: [Ray] Improve documentation on batch inference
vllm.author: richardliaw
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This commit updates the batch inference example to leverage Ray Data's new
native vLLM integration (ray.data.llm) introduced in Ray 2.44. Changes include:

Replace custom LLMPredictor implementation with Ray Data's built-in vLLM processor
Add configuration for continuous batching and other vLLM opti
